title: Abundance Codex Entry
description: Schema for validating Abundance Codex entries (YAML frontmatter). v1.1 — adds domain_connections for cross-domain graph layer.

id.description: Entry ID in format ac-YYYYMMDD-[4char hash]

domain.description: Primary domain — determines file placement. Based on where the entry's core MECHANISM lives, not its effects.

domain_connections.description: Secondary domains this entry touches. Creates the cross-domain graph layer without duplicating files. The primary domain (above) determines file placement; these connections enable graph queries, convergence detection, and cross-domain navigation.

domain.description: Connected domain slug. Must differ from primary domain.

relationship.description: How this entry relates to the connected domain.

strength.description: How strongly this entry connects to the domain. 0.9+ = core to both domains. 0.5-0.8 = significant secondary connection. Below 0.5 = tangential (consider omitting).

note.description: Optional one-line explanation of the connection. Useful for agent reasoning and convergence mapping.

co_author_model.description: The AI model that co-authored this entry. Transparent attribution for multi-model dataset.

co_author_human.description: The human curator who co-authored this entry.

co_creative_partner.description: AI co-creative partner that provided strategic advising, feedback, and architectural direction during entry development.
